title: melia azedarach var. cochinchinensis
intro: Melia azedarach var. cochinchinensis, also known as the Chinachin or Neem of Cochinchina, is a variety of the Melia azedarach tree, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Melia azedarach var. cochinchinensis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use in traditional medicine to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
